title: Resource Exhaustion Vulnerability
description: The system's lack of information about its architecture and potential attack vectors makes it susceptible to denial-of-service (DoS) attacks. Attackers could exploit vulnerabilities to consume excessive system resources, leading to service outages and impacting legitimate users.
attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the system’s code or infrastructure, sending malicious requests, or leveraging known vulnerabilities to overwhelm the system with traffic.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.
Utilize a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter malicious traffic.
Employ load balancing to distribute traffic across multiple servers.
